content:
About Hayes Auto Works

Hayes Auto Works is a family-run, two-bay shop in East Dearborn. David Hayes opened the doors to give neighbors honest, no-pressure auto repair. We treat every car like it is our own.
title: About / Our Story

content:
Hours & Location

Find us in East Dearborn, Michigan. Open Monday through Friday, 8am to 6pm, and Saturday 9am to 2pm. Call ahead or book online and we will get you scheduled.
title: Hours & Location

content:
Our Services

Oil changes, brakes, tires, batteries, check engine diagnostics, and seasonal maintenance. Whatever your car needs, our team can handle it.
title: Services
